'''鈭歽-g-h-th''' ('''kayaghethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jalouse|jalouse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jalouse|jalouse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-g-h-th
|-
! Lemma
| kayaghethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyaghethoko|thiyaghethoko]] || [[word:jiyaghethoko|jiyaghethoko]] || [[word:shiyaghethoko|shiyaghethoko]] || [[word:kiyaghethoko|kiyaghethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyaghethoko|thuthuyaghethoko]] || [[word:jujuyaghethoko|jujuyaghethoko]] || [[word:shushuyaghethoko|shushuyaghethoko]] || [[word:kukuyaghethoko|kukuyaghethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyaghethoko|thuyaghethoko]] || [[word:juyaghethoko|juyaghethoko]] || [[word:shuyaghethoko|shuyaghethoko]] || [[word:kuyaghethoko|kuyaghethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyaghethoko|thuyaghethoko]] || [[word:juyaghethoko|juyaghethoko]] || [[word:shuyaghethoko|shuyaghethoko]] || [[word:kuyaghethoko|kuyaghethoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyaghethoko|thoyaghethoko]] || [[word:joyaghethoko|joyaghethoko]] || [[word:shoyaghethoko|shoyaghethoko]] || [[word:koyaghethoko|koyaghethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyaghethoko|thoyaghethoko]] || [[word:joyaghethoko|joyaghethoko]] || [[word:shoyaghethoko|shoyaghethoko]] || [[word:koyaghethoko|koyaghethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yaghethoko|th忙yaghethoko]] || [[word:j忙yaghethoko|j忙yaghethoko]] || [[word:sh忙yaghethoko|sh忙yaghethoko]] || [[word:k忙yaghethoko|k忙yaghethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayaghethoko|thathayaghethoko]] || [[word:jajayaghethoko|jajayaghethoko]] || [[word:shashayaghethoko|shashayaghethoko]] || [[word:kakayaghethoko|kakayaghethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayaghethoko|thayaghethoko]] || [[word:jayaghethoko|jayaghethoko]] || [[word:shayaghethoko|shayaghethoko]] || [[word:kayaghethoko|kayaghethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayaghethoko|thayaghethoko]] || [[word:jayaghethoko|jayaghethoko]] || [[word:shayaghethoko|shayaghethoko]] || [[word:kayaghethoko|kayaghethoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
